show me all open bugs,"There are 23 open bugs across three projects: Mobile App (9), E-Learning Platform (13), and web Platform (1). Four of these bugs are overdue.
Here are the details:
- #48 [High] payment crash
- #45 [High] payment crash
- #44 [High] payment crash
- #43 [High] payment crash
- #42 [High] payment crash
- #41 [High] payment crash

- #37 [High] Checkout error
- #36 [Normal] Fix login
- #31 [High] Fix payment bug
- #28 [High] Course search returns incorrect results when using filters
- #25 [Very Low] Fix typo in landing page footer text
- #22 [High] Video streaming freezes on slow internet connections
- #12 [Normal] Students don't receive course update notifications
- #11 [High] Course dashboard layout broken on tablets (768px-1024px)
- #10 [High] Payment processing times out for courses over $100
- #9 [Urgent] XSS vulnerability in course discussion forum
- #8 [Urgent] Course completion certificate shows wrong student name
- #7 [High] Mobile app crashes when enrolling in course with >50 lessons
- #6 [Normal] Course progress bar shows incorrect percentage
- #4 [High] Video player crashes on iOS Safari when switching to fullscreen
Would you like me to take any action on this?",direct,Listed open bug issues from Redmine,read,baseline read query,show me all open bugs

what are the risks this week?,"- Six overdue tasks are currently delaying the e‑learning platform release, with the oldest item (real‑time chat) 45 days past due.
- The video‑streaming freeze issue (30 days overdue) and the course‑search filter bug (4 days overdue) are actively impacting user experience.
- Homepage‑speed optimization, though marked closed, remains overdue and may indicate a gap in tracking completion.
- Mobile app crashes on large‑enrollment courses and checkout errors are both overdue by ≤3 days, posing immediate reliability risks.

- Collectively, these blockers threaten on‑time delivery and should be prioritized for immediate resolution and resource reallocation.",risk_agent,Identified risks and overdue issues for the week,risk,baseline risk query,what are the risks this week?
